title: Bridging Borders: Vietnam Launchpad – Move, Build, Succeed for Overseas Vietnamese
metaDescription: Season 2 of Bridging Borders returns with practical insights for Overseas Vietnamese building businesses, careers and new lives in Vietnam.
about: Season 2 of Bridging Borders has returned with fresh perspectives and practical insights for Overseas Vietnamese looking to reimagine their personal and professional journey in Vietnam. Whether it's building a business, moving a family, or expanding creative influence through content and media, it is all about hearing real stories and connecting with like-minded people.

matters.heading: Season 2 – Coming Home with Purpose: Come Back and Build Forward
body: Are you an Overseas Vietnamese thinking about coming back — not just to live, but to lead, build, and make an impact? Bridging Borders: Vietnam Launchpad returns after a successful first season, and this time we're diving even deeper.

This year's focus is all about startups, innovation, and marketing in Vietnam's evolving business landscape — from agile SMEs to large-scale corporates. Whether you're an entrepreneur, creative strategist, or business leader, this event is designed for those ready to drive change and shape what's next.

Of course, we're still covering the essentials — career transitions, cultural reintegration, and family relocation — but now with a sharper lens on the realities and opportunities of returning home. You'll also hear from an inspiring lineup of Overseas Vietnamese who've built standout careers and companies both here and abroad.

details.label: Venue
details.value: Diamond Hall B, Sofitel Saigon Plaza, 17 Le Duan, Ben Nghe, Ho Chi Minh City

details.label: Participation Fee
details.value: Prepayment 300,000 VND | At door 350,000 VND (strictly no-cash payment)
